title: Discovery Candidates
description: Unverified candidate list output from discovery phase. Each candidate holds discovery signals (weak evidence) across funding stage, AI role postings, and location hints. Validation phase processes these in fail-fast order.

generated_at.description: ISO date or YYYY-MM-DD when this candidate list was created

version.description: Semantic version of the discovery output format

candidates.description: Unordered list of candidate companies with weak discovery signals

name.description: Company name as it appears in job postings / public sources

funding.description: Snippet about funding round, stage, or amount. Null if not found.

ai_role_posting.description: Example job title or role description from a posting. Null if not found.

location_signal.description: Snippet about office location or hiring region from job posting. Null if not found.

verification_status.description: Status of this candidate as validation proceeds.

notes.description: Operator notes about ambiguities, caveats, or specific validation tasks.
